title: Mayor Walsh Announces Road Reconstruction Project on Milton Avenue
summary: Mayor Ben Walsh announced a road reconstruction project on Milton Avenue starting November 4, 2024, involving milling and paving from West Genesee Street to the city line. Work will occur 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. daily with an expected one-week completion timeline, weather permitting, while maintaining road access with potential traffic delays.

political_signal.description: Mayor-led announcement of infrastructure investment signals prioritization of road maintenance and asset management within city transportation network.
